CodeSystem​.where(url = 'http:​/​/hl7​.org​/fhir​/uv​/aerospace​/CodeSystem​/artemis-landing-region-cs')errorConformance resource /Volumes/SonicMagic/Code/implementation-guides/aerospace-medicine-ig/fsh-generated/resources/CodeSystem-artemis-landing-region-cs.json - the canonical URL (https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/artemis-landing-region-cs) does not match the URL (http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/aerospace/CodeSystem/artemis-landing-region-cs). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match RESOURCE_CANONICAL_MISMATCH
CodeSystem (l1/c9696)errorWhen HL7 is publishing a resource, the owning committee must be stated using the http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-wg extension VALIDATION_HL7_WG_NEEDED
CodeSystem (l1/c9696)informationMost code systems defined in HL7 IGs will need to move to THO later during the process. Consider giving this code system a THO URL now (See https://confluence.hl7.org/display/TSMG/Terminology+Play+Book, and/or talk to TSMG) CODESYSTEM_THO_CHECK

TYPE_SPECIFIC_CHECKS_DT_QTY_UCUM_ANNOTATIONS

fsh-generated/resources/Observation-ISS-T2-Run-Type-001.jsonUCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {activity} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked

TYPE_SPECIFIC_CHECKS_DT_QTY_UCUM_ANNOTATIONS_NOT_IN_UNIT

fsh-generated/resources/Observation-ISS-StressBurden-Day180.jsonUCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {stress_units} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked, and the Quantity.unit 'stress units' SHOULD contain the annotation (it does not)
fsh-generated/resources/Observation-ISS-StressBurden-Day90.jsonUCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {stress_units} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked, and the Quantity.unit 'stress units' SHOULD contain the annotation (it does not)

fsh-generated/resources/Questionnaire-MEDB51AerobicFitnessQuestionnaire.jsonThe concept '62872-7' is deprecated and its use should be reviewed; Wrong Display Name 'Oxygen consumption (VO2) at maximal exercise --peak' for http://loinc.org#62872-7. Valid display is one of 2 choices: 'Deprecated PhenX measure - assay herpes simplex virus types 1 - 2' (en-US) or 'Deprecated PhenX measure - assay herpes simplex virus types 1 - 2' (en-US) (for the language(s) 'en-US') (for 'http://loinc.org#62872-7')
